name: Docker / containerd CRI runtime
sampleLines: 2024-04-28T04:02:03.123456789Z stdout F Server started on port 8080
2024-04-28T04:02:04.987654321Z stderr F panic: runtime error: index out of range [5] with length 3
description: Written from scratch against the Kubernetes CRI logging spec (Apache-2.0). The on-disk format kubelet expects from CRI runtimes (containerd, CRI-O, docker via dockershim/cri-dockerd) is documented in kubernetes/cri-api `vendor/k8s.io/cri-api/pkg/apis/runtime/v1/api.proto` and the contributors guide 'CRI container logs': '<RFC3339Nano-timestamp> <stdout|stderr> <F|P> <message>'. F = full line, P = partial line (kubelet stitches consecutive P's into one logical entry).
